name: Rox, Team Hickenlooper
subject: John was my boss. I want him as my president.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I'll cut to the chase: John is one of my best friends. He's been one of my very best collaborators. And team, if elected, he'll be one of the most outstanding presidents we could hope for. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418c3/1602480157/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend: My name is Rox. I was raised in rural Montana, I'm a social worker and minister by training, and I served as John's Cabinet Secretary and Chief of Staff while he was Mayor of Denver and Governor of Colorado.

And I've asked (ok, badgered) the team to let me send this quick note before John takes the debate stage in one hour.

**I 'll cut to the chase: John is one of my best friends. He's been one of my very best collaborators. And team, if he's elected, he'll be an outstanding president.**

With a fantastic team and John's wise leadership, we guided Colorado through countless challenges together. Throughout his two terms, I watched him achieve more real, progressive results, on issues ranging from affordable housing and homelessness to healthcare to reproductive rights to gun violence prevention, than any person who'll be sharing the stage with him tonight.

That's the effective leadership he plans to bring to the White House. I know what John is capable of--and I'm looking forward to millions more people learning about him tonight.

**If you 'd like to support the team as they work to take advantage of this critical moment, will you chip in while John is on stage tonight? ** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190627_RW_20190627-fr-RW-onstage-all_all_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** Now, let's get settled in for the discussion. John's really fun to debate with--just another reason I'm looking forward to watching this!

Thanks,
Rox

Roxane White
Former Chief of Staff to Governor Hickenlooper
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fe/1602480157/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418ff/1602480157/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fc/1602480157/VEsA/ "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fd/1602480157/VEsB/ "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fa/1602480157/VEsO/ "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fb/1602480157/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771768/691c9bd/6d447ca6/11a418fe/1602480157/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

subject: what keeps me up at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
I have to be honest:
|

I have to be honest: Something is keeping me up at night.
**The Republicans looking at this race are _so_ extreme.** They've expressed cynical and backward-looking views. If they got into office, there's no doubt in my mind that they'd roll back the progress Americans have worked hard for.
I'm running because the country needs better leadership. [_**Please contribute to my campaign today.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa244/18d6a294/4bc57319/26d684b3/2381318011/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jme190627?refcode=jme190627_m&recurring=true")

name: Mike
subject: what Tim didn't say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Team -- have you seen some of what Tim said last night at the debate?
> _" What kind of country are we running here where we have a President of the United States who's so focused on hate and fear and division, and what has happened now, the end result, is now we've got kids literally with three week old diapers that haven't been changed. **We 've got to tell this President, that is not a sign of strength, that is a sign of weakness**..."_
> [DO YOU AGREE? ](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-fec-deadline?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+DO+YOU+AGREEnbsp&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2")
| [Yes! I STAND WITH TIM](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-fec-deadline?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Yes+I+STAND+WITH+TIM&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2")
---
> _" We need to start dealing with the trauma that our kids have. We need trauma-based care in every school. We need Social and Emotional Learning in every school. **We need to play offense...** We're doing something wrong and we need reform around trauma-based care."_
[DO YOU AGREE? ](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-fec-deadline?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+DO+YOU+AGREEnbsp&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2")
[Yes! I STAND WITH TIM](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-fec-deadline?refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T1&amount=3&recurring=1&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Yes+I+STAND+WITH+TIM&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190627_4_4_T2")
---
This was the first time Tim had a chance to go toe-to-toe with his Democratic opponents in front of the entire nation and he knocked it out of the park.

Let me know if you need anything --

Mike

_\--_
_Campaign Manager_
_Tim Ryan for America_

**P.S.** It's okay if you haven't fully committed to a candidate yet -- but you should know that Tim has traction with voters who voted for Obama in 2012 AND Trump in 2016. The media has called him the _" best positioned to send Trump back to Mar-a-Lago"_ for a reason.

**We can win this.[_Contribute here._](http://secure.timryanforamerica. name: Kamala 2020
subject: Are you watching?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|

name: Cory Booker
subject: In the past 24 hours, we had the largest online fundraising day since we launched this campaign for president.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I want to report back on something amazing that's happening:**In the past 24 hours, we had the largest online fundraising day since we launched this campaign for president.** Supporters have chipped in from all 50 states and Puerto Rico -- bringing our average online donation to just $19.58. And, team, we're over 70% of the way to the DNC requirement of hitting 130,000 individual donors. One thing is clear: I can't do this alone. Like my parents taught me growing up: no one man -- or person -- can do it all themselves. It takes a community of people to create real, effective change. **And that 's been made clear by this grassroots community.** I'm relying on people like you to spread our message of justice for all and a truly equal America. [**Can you help us finish our day strong by chipping in $1, $5, or whatever you can to my campaign? Every contribution helps us keep up the momentum.**](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190627-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190627_CB_20190627-fr-CB-postdebate2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") With gratitude,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190627-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190627_CB_20190627-fr-CB-postdebate2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a2/5fca0d19/9e6fd9a/291bf260/1139888585/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a2/5fca0d19/9e6fd9a/291bf26f/1139888585/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a2/5fca0d19/9e6fd9a/291bf26e/1139888585/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a2/5fca0d19/9e6fd9a/291bf26d/1139888585/VEsB/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09a2/5fca0d19/9e6fd9a/291bf261/1139888585/VEsO/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: [no subject]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I just got off the debate stage here in Miami, friend. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377176f/691c9bd/6d58e772/11a41fad/2797430921/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| I just got off the debate stage here in Miami, friend.

I'm still collecting my thoughts, but one word sums up the experience: _Wow_.

Not just for the honor of being able to stand up there and share a vision of a progressive America where we once again get things done together...but for the honor of being able to represent you--this incredible team--up on that stage.

Let me say it again: I can't thank you enough for all your support.

More tomorrow. Excited to keep this momentum going.

John ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. name: Kamala Harris
subject: America does not want to witness a food fight. They want to know how we're going to put food on the table.
body:
We just wrapped up our first debate of this presidential primary in Miami,
where I shared my vision for the America we can build together -- and my
plan to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump.

This election is about so much more than philosophical or hypothetical
arguments -- it’s about laying out an agenda that will help real families.

America does not want to witness a food fight. They want to know how we're
going to put food on the table. That’s why I’ve proposed a 3AM Agenda with
solutions that will have a direct and immediate effect on people’s lives,
paychecks, and health care.

Together, we can reverse President Trump’s trillion-dollar tax cut for big
corporations and the top 1% -- and use that money to give a tax credit of
up to $6,000 to working families each year.

Together, we can provide a tax credit for people spending 30 percent or
more of their income on rent and utilities.

Together, we can close the teacher pay gap by making the largest federal
investment in our teachers in U.S. history.

Together, we can flip the script and hold corporations accountable by
requiring them to prove they are not engaging in pay discrimination -- and
fining companies that fail to close their pay gaps.

Together, we can pass Medicare for All, which would remove the profit
motive from America’s health care system and ensure no person -- no matter
where they live or how much they make -- is left behind.

Together, we can take action to curb gun violence in communities across
our country -- including mandating the most comprehensive federal
background checks in our nation’s history.

Together, we can make community college free and four-year public college
debt-free.

These proposals -- and more -- are what we can accomplish if we fight
together and win this election. If you believe in what America CAN be, I’m
calling on you to stand with me now and add
a donation to our campaign for
president tonight:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190627-eoq?refcode=ema190627-15-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5452_5755789_lk-Wwy&akid=5452%2E5755789%2Elk-Wwy ]Chip in $5 now

name: Michael's iPhone
subject: An important milestone for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Team - I just walked off the stage in Miami. What an incredible night. Your support helped us get here and fuels our campaign.

I'm more confident than ever that, together, we must build a broad coalition to defeat Trump, end the corruption in Washington, and create a new era of American democracy and opportunity.

It won't be easy, but it's what our parents would expect and what our children deserve.

I need your help to continue our fight:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadcd/134673f2/159f714/6996a237/996644164/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

I hope you'll join me in this work,

Michael

Sent from my iPhone

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original Message from Kamala Harris, June 27, 2019

We just wrapped up our first debate of this presidential primary in Miami,
where I shared my vision for the America we can build together -- and my
plan to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump.

This election is about so much more than philosophical or hypothetical
arguments -- it’s about laying out an agenda that will help real families.

America does not want to witness a food fight. They want to know how we're
going to put food on the table. That’s why I’ve proposed a 3AM Agenda with
solutions that will have a direct and immediate effect on people’s lives,
paychecks, and health care.

Together, we can reverse President Trump’s trillion-dollar tax cut for big
corporations and the top 1% -- and use that money to give a tax credit of
up to $6,000 to working families each year.

Together, we can provide a tax credit for people spending 30 percent or
more of their income on rent and utilities.

Together, we can close the teacher pay gap by making the largest federal
investment in our teachers in U.S. history.

Together, we can flip the script and hold corporations accountable by
requiring them to prove they are not engaging in pay discrimination -- and
fining companies that fail to close their pay gaps.

Together, we can pass Medicare for All, which would remove the profit
motive from America’s health care system and ensure no person -- no matter
where they live or how much they make -- is left behind.

Together, we can take action to curb gun violence in communities across
our country -- including mandating the most comprehensive federal
background checks in our nation’s history.

Together, we can make community college free and four-year public college
debt-free.

These proposals -- and more -- are what we can accomplish if we fight
together and win this election. If you believe in what America CAN be, I’m
calling on you to stand with me now and add
a donation to our campaign for
president tonight:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

body:

| |
---|---|---
| Peter, Congresswoman Lucy McBath’s entire candidacy and career in office has been riddled with accidents. When she ran for Congress, she “accidentally” confused which state she lives in. Once elected, she “accidentally” failed to handle constituent services for months on end. And now we find out, she “accidentally” underreported her finances by as much as two million dollars! I’ve always had a hard time trusting Lucy McBath, but if what she says is true and these are in fact accidents, then it’s another example of her inability to do the job she was elected to do and why **we must defeat her in 2020**. [Donate $20 to defeat Lucy McBath](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jihloo-udyuidthb-y/) These glaring errors don't seem to faze her donors. Every month, thousands of dollars pour into Lucy’s account from radicals across the nation. They might not know Lucy or even care which state she actually lives in – they just want to keep Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House. **This is why I need your help.** [Donate](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jihloo-udyuidthb-j/) We have to keep up with her fundraising if we’re going to stop the accidental congresswoman from leading our district down a disastrous path. [**Please join our campaign to take back the sixth district by making a donation of $100, $50, or even $25 before our fundraising deadline on June 30th.**](https://brandonbeach.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jihloo-udyuidthb-t/) Thanks for what you can do today. name: Whitney Holt
subject: Why I’m personally invested
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger For Congress
body:
In a recent email, Abigail outlined what motivates her and why she's working so hard in DC. Let me take a moment to do the same and tell you why I'm working so hard to build a strong campaign for 2020.
| | Hi Peter,

In a recent email, Abigail outlined what motivates her and why she's working so hard in DC. Let me take a moment to do the same and tell you why I'm working so hard to build a strong campaign for 2020.

Virginia's 7th district is my home. I grew up in Chesterfield County, and after moving away for college, my husband and I returned to raise our own family here. We now have three young boys and are active in our community. I spend my workday ensuring my home district has a responsive, engaged representative who is advocating for families like mine. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/KoxNE1ct3gk2jmMXE1HaAD-LdRGMg88K_93Q4dMtqVw=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.28_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800) I love my job, and the end of each quarter is an exciting (but sometimes stressful) time! We're heading into an extremely busy weekend at Spanberger HQ because Sunday is our second end-of-quarter deadline of the year.

**[While Abigail is working hard in Washington to represent VA-07, I'm in the district making sure she has the support she needs. I'd appreciate if you'd consider chipping in to keep us on track. >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/KoxNE1ct3gk2jmMXE1HaAD-LdRGMg88K_93Q4dMtqVw=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.28_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)**

One thing that sets quarterly deadlines apart from our daily, weekly, and monthly goals is that our fundraising numbers will be released to the public.

I know that this report isn't the only way to measure our grassroots grit, but it's a strong indicator of the strength of our campaign. **It 's important to me that the fundraising number we report shows that our community is behind Abigail for another competitive -- and expensive -- election.**

**[Peter, we have a big weekend ahead of us, with $32,000 to raise. Would you please help us kick off our fundraising drive by supporting Abigail's re-election campaign with a donation? >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/KoxNE1ct3gk2jmMXE1HaAD-LdRGMg88K_93Q4dMtqVw=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.28_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)** | ********[CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/KoxNE1ct3gk2jmMXE1HaAD-LdRGMg88K_93Q4dMtqVw=?refcode=em_fr_2019.06.28_b1_wh_all&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,1000,2800)********
---
When I reach out and ask for your support, please know that I am deeply and personally invested in this campaign. I'm motivated by many of the same things you are, and there's nothing I want more than to send Abigail back to Washington in 2020 to continue to fight for all of Central Virginia's families.

Whitney Holt
_Finance Director
Abigail Spanberger for Congress_
** **

** **
| Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/Bj5X26pKW1RwmCJkqXEnXx8JG9PztqY5uT2RejdcAg8=)

If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/g-1DNRzeWTATHoNxgv0ARxSCb3C4IyGuArLG9O6ZBn0=) to request fewer emails from Abigail's campaign.

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/4IrPpj2A-lJ5mGzO94YeGXtvI-kdqO3fYMEkQC3SPBo=/qqUwEpGfDYJFzzjOzlIZStqoAfO7kUqhgHCP4X4hwJY=).

Spanberger For Congress
PO Box 3121
Glen Allen, VA 23058

| Paid for by Spanberger For Congress

Team Hood

name: My Faith Votes
subject: SCOTUS Watch
body:
| | Critical updates from the current session of the Supreme Court
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MD-bmoOZckRD4a99_ebaMgQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=1)
| The Supreme Court’s session is coming to a close, and in May and June, they have issued numerous important rulings. **Here are five Supreme Court rulings worth noting:**
1. American Legion v. American Humanist Association
2. Box v. Planned Parenthood of Indiana and Kentucky, Inc.
3. Knick v. Township of Scott, Pennsylvania
4. Department of Commerce v. New York
5. Rucho v. Common Cause

#### American Legion v. American Humanist Association
In the case better known as the Bladensburg Peace Cross Case, the Supreme Court ruled 7-2 in favor of the World War I Memorial in Maryland to remain standing. A local American Legion Post erected the Bladensburg Cross in 1925 to honor the memory of 49 men in uniform who gave their lives on the battlefield in WWI. Just last week, the Supreme Court ruled by a strong consensus that the memorial would be allowed to stand. Only Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg and Justice Sonia Sotomayor dissented. And while this is a tremendous victory for religious freedom, many believe the ruling was narrow in scope. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MgS7DBBek1PAeiDjDaghU2Q&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=2).
#### Box v. Planned Parenthood of Indiana and Kentucky, Inc.
The Supreme Court upheld a pro-life provision of an Indiana and Kentucky law at the end of May that requires aborted fetal remains to be buried or cremated. The Supreme Court’s reversal of the 7th Circuit’s decision is significant because it, again, affirms that an aborted fetus is in fact human. The Supreme Court, however, did not reverse the 7th Circuit Court’s decision to strike down the portion of the Indiana law that prohibits abortions on the basis of sex, race, or disability. Justice Thomas addressed this provision of the law. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MSrA8o1ExmBnzRBJ2xrfrsA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=3).
#### Knick v. Township of Scott, Pennsylvania
The Supreme Court ruled on a 5-4 vote in favor of Rose Mary Knick overturning a precedent that had been in place for more than 30 years. The five conservative justices ruled in favor of an individual’s property rights, and in support of Ms. Knick in this case, and the liberal justices on the bench, Justices Kagan, Ginsburg, Breyer and Sotomayor all dissented. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MyJjz1cWix5nWAhJgzTboZQ&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=4).
#### **Department of Commerce v. New York**
In a 5-4 decision, the Supreme Court ruled that the Trump administration cannot include a citizenship question on the 2020 census. Chief Justice John Roberts joined the four liberal justices on the bench to strike down this measure. While the decision is a setback for President Trump’s administration, the Court’s decision does still leave the door open for the question to be allowed in the future. Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MjLlHRN-S5qEWFVjaC_LtCg&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=5).
#### Rucho v. Common Cause
In another close decision, the Supreme Court ruled 5-4 that North Carolina’s claim of partisan gerrymandering is beyond the reach of the courts. The four liberal justices on the bench believe the Supreme Court should step in to put an end to gerrymandering. However, with Justice Kavanaugh now on the bench, the issue of partisan gerrymandering is decided. Justice Kagan wrote the dissenting opinion stating, “For the first time ever, this Court refuses to remedy a constitutional violation because it thinks the task beyond judicial capabilities." Read the full analysis [here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ie-EuEwprJECnklQBd9pnr0oT_KQ5AG8gbr0HbrBqP7MX0CVFMIObw8Och8qHNDPCw&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=6).
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=7).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=9) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190628com01&n=10)

| Here's the truth: [I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc9/134673f2/151fe3e/6996a390/2268418866/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Many people considered our campaign a long shot. They said I had almost no chance of being in the debate.

[Last night, we proved them wrong - all thanks to you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc9/134673f2/151fe3e/6996a390/2268418866/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I've taken in this journey has been because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has had what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going. ](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc9/134673f2/151fe3e/6996a390/2268418866/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our grassroots campaign has made incredible progress.

Sunday is our first public fundraising deadline, and the doubters are itching to "prove" that this campaign won't make it. We need to show that we're here to stay.

[**Today I 'm counting on your support again, because we can't fall short after coming so far. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters ahead of this crucial fundraising deadline? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc9/134673f2/151fe3e/6996a390/2268418866/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B1_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Last night, on stage, I shared my vision for building opportunity for every American and restoring integrity to our government. Now I'm planning for what comes next.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

clean_body: | | | Here's the truth: "" Many people considered our campaign a long shot. They said I had almost no chance of being in the debate. "" Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I've taken in this journey has been because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has had what it takes to win this hard-fought race. "" Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our grassroots campaign has made incredible progress. Sunday is our first public fundraising deadline, and the doubters are itching to "prove" that this campaign won't make it. We need to show that we're here to stay. "" | "" Last night, on stage, I shared my vision for building opportunity for every American and restoring integrity to our government. Now I'm planning for what comes next. As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us. "" "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Your continuing support means so much to me. Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Ed Markey
subject: The email rush is coming 📧📧📧
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Hello,

We're three days out from a crucial FEC reporting deadline, and that means my campaign (and a bunch of other Democratic campaigns) is going to be emailing you a lot over the weekend to reach our fundraising goal.

My campaign is scheduled to send EIGHT emails over the next three days! But here's why:

**Raising money through emails like this means I can do less "Call Time" phoning up supporters for donations, and instead, I can be actively engaged in fighting back against Trump's dangerous agenda.**

So, here's how you can keep your inbox count down and avoid all the incoming emails: [_**pitch in $10 toward our $25,000 FEC deadline goal today, and we 'll keep your address out of the next seven emails.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-062819_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

_**[Donate $100 now](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=EM-062819_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

_**[Donate another amount](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-062819_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
I wish as much as anybody that fundraising wasn't such a significant part of my job as a Senator. But the reality is, fighting back on the ground against President Trump and his administration requires a lot of resources.

And FEC deadlines are so important because our fundraising numbers will be public on the FEC's website after the deadline. National Republicans will be looking at it for any vulnerabilities in my campaign that they can exploit to defeat me. We can't give them any signs.

_**[So, if you pitch in $10 or more today toward our $25,000 FEC deadline goal, and we'll make sure we keep your address out of the next seven emails over the weekend.](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-062819_1&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Ed

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Anyone can talk. What matters is action.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I'm still brimming with energy from last night--from seeing the names of Debate Donors who helped supercharge our campaign this week, to the adrenaline of taking the stage and sharing my vision of an | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377176e/691c9bd/6d5f3c1d/11a41c87/656410049/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, I'm still brimming with energy from last night--from seeing the names of Debate Donors who helped supercharge our campaign this week, to the adrenaline of taking the stage and sharing my vision of an America where we get progressive things done, together.

Look--we heard a lot of great ideas on stage last night.

But the truth is, I was the only one on that debate stage who has actually done what everyone else is just talking about. If that track record inspires you, help us take this campaign to the next level. **** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebate-all_all_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** **I used the scrappy spirit I developed as a small business owner to actually make Colorado one of the most progressive states in America.**

We got real results. We actually passed universal background checks, got to near universal health care, and attacked climate change with the toughest methane regulations in the country.

We worked together--Democrats and Republicans, businesses and non-profits alike--to make a real difference in people's lives. We dramatically expanded reproductive rights and reduced teenage abortions by two-thirds. We were the first to legalize marijuana, and in the process, transformed our justice system. And we created the number one economy in America.

We did it all without radically expanding our government or touting socialism as the solution.

**Anyone can talk. But what matters is action. What matters are results.**

Today, our team woke up to face our next big challenge: our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

The amount we raise by Sunday night's FEC filing deadline will decide how quickly we can grow this campaign--and show how many people share our goal of getting real results that change lives, and can change the course of our nation.

**If you like what you saw on the debate stage last night, chip in now:** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebate-all_all_b1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebate-all_all_b25&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. clean_body: I'm still brimming with energy from last night--from seeing the names of Debate Donors who helped supercharge our campaign this week, to the adrenaline of taking the stage and sharing my vision of an | | | "" | Friend, I'm still brimming with energy from last night--from seeing the names of Debate Donors who helped supercharge our campaign this week, to the adrenaline of taking the stage and sharing my vision of an America where we get progressive things done, together. Look--we heard a lot of great ideas on stage last night. But the truth is, I was the only one on that debate stage who has actually done what everyone else is just talking about. If that track record inspires you, help us take this campaign to the next level. ** "="**** I used the scrappy spirit I developed as a small business owner to actually make Colorado one of the most progressive states in America. We got real results. We actually passed universal background checks, got to near universal health care, and attacked climate change with the toughest methane regulations in the country. We worked together--Democrats and Republicans, businesses and non-profits alike--to make a real difference in people's lives. We dramatically expanded reproductive rights and reduced teenage abortions by two-thirds. We were the first to legalize marijuana, and in the process, transformed our justice system. And we created the number one economy in America. We did it all without radically expanding our government or touting socialism as the solution. Anyone can talk. But what matters is action. What matters are results. Today, our team woke up to face our next big challenge: our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. The amount we raise by Sunday night's FEC filing deadline will decide how quickly we can grow this campaign--and show how many people share our goal of getting real results that change lives, and can change the course of our nation. If you like what you saw on the debate stage last night, chip in now: "="** ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** ** "="** Thank you, John | | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020 PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206 Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible. name: Kamala Harris
subject: I hope I made you proud
body:
I hope I made you proud during last night’s debate.

From combating the climate crisis to expanding health care to curbing gun
violence, each of the candidates on that stage brought real, bold ideas to
the table on how to achieve a better America.

Let me be
clear: I’m the only candidate on that debate stage who has the proven
ability to prosecute the case against four more years of this
Administration.

If you’re with me in this fight, I need you to make
an investment in our campaign today.
Our next FEC deadline is on Sunday at midnight, and we are up against our
steepest goal ever: raising $1 million online before the deadline.

The task we have ahead of us won’t be easy, but I’m not running to be your
next president because it’s easy. I’m running because I firmly believe in
our vision for the future of this country -- and I’m willing to fight for
it.

If you believe in what we can accomplish together, I need you to pitch in
right now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1002&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1003&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1004&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Another Amount

What we are trying to accomplish is not insurmountable. Many of us have
been through some difficult times -- moments where progress seemed
impossible. We were fearless then, and we must be fearless now.

I know that if enough people step up and pitch in, we can keep up the
momentum we have seen so far during our campaign, continue building our
movement, and deliver the change millions of Americans are ready and
waiting for.

I’m fired up. If you’re with me, let’s show them all the energy and power
of our grassroots team. Pitch in anything you can to help us reach our
goal before Sunday’s FEC deadline:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-17-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=5459_5755789_jGmMkn&akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn ]Another Amount

We’re at a turning point, both in this race and in the history of our
country. I’m confident we have what it takes to win.

Thank you for believing in the future of this country. I’m proud to stand
with you in this fight.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://action.kamalaharris.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5459%2E5755789%2EjGmMkn

body:

subject: McConnell's doomed

body:
---
| | I only reach out when it's important, so hear me out: [**_Top Democrats and I are banding together today to raise Ben Ray $50,000. If we succeed, he 'll have the resources to WIN his Senate race and finally kick Mitch McConnell out of office. Can you kick in $15 by midnight? >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b52e/18e32a7f/598cef47/7bac6683/2212284241/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b1_lieu_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") I stood by Ben Ray's side as he led the charge to do what so many thought impossible -- take back the House. So trust me: Now that he's running for Senate -- _**Mitch McConnell should be absolutely terrified.**_ Want proof? Since Ben Ray launched his race for Senate: \-- Mitch's approval rating completely plummeted \-- He's now in danger of losing the seat he's held for decades \-- And Democrats have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat McConnell and flip the ENTIRE Senate Republicans are flooding New Mexico with cash because they know if Ben Ray wins, they're completely doomed. It's music to my ears. I'm proud to stand by Ben Ray's side once again as he runs for New Mexico Senate, because I know he's our best shot to win the whole dang thing. _**[His very first end-of-quarter deadline is in 48 hours, and I'm not leaving until he has every last penny he needs to pull this off. Will you chip in, help us reach $50,000 for Ben Ray, and join Democrats in making history today? >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b52e/18e32a7f/598cef47/7bac6683/2212284241/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b1_lieu_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")**_ Thank you, Ted Lieu

clean_body: | | I only reach out when it's important, so hear me out: "" I stood by Ben Ray's side as he led the charge to do what so many thought impossible -- take back the House. So trust me: Now that he's running for Senate -- Mitch McConnell should be absolutely terrified. Want proof? Since Ben Ray launched his race for Senate: \-- Mitch's approval rating completely plummeted \-- He's now in danger of losing the seat he's held for decades \-- And Democrats have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat McConnell and flip the ENTIRE Senate Republicans are flooding New Mexico with cash because they know if Ben Ray wins, they're completely doomed. It's music to my ears. I'm proud to stand by Ben Ray's side once again as he runs for New Mexico Senate, because I know he's our best shot to win the whole dang thing. "" Thank you, Ted Lieu | "" "" "" People for Ben PO Box 25371 Albuquerque, NM 87125 "" | | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: Jordan Foster
subject: I'm about to update Tina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I want to be able to tell Tina we're ready to meet this goal.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") friend,

We're running out of time here: Less than 72 hours left until our end-of-quarter deadline, and $21,077 to raise to close our fundraising gap. **I 'm about to give Tina an update on how close we are to our goal, and I want to be able to tell her we're closing in. [Can Tina count on you to rush a contribution of $10 or as much as possible right now?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

After this deadline, our numbers will go public, and everyone will know how strong or how weak this team is.

If we meet our goal, we will be able to hire more staff, expand our budget, and reach voters in every corner of the state.

But if we fall short, even by a small margin, the GOP and their dark money donors will double down on attacking us.

Pro-Trump super PACs will spend MORE against us. Donald Trump and Mike Pence will plan MORE trips to Minnesota to rile up the right-wing base. And we will be forced to cut back on our budget, so we won't be able to fight back and set the record straight.

That's why this deadline is so critical, and that's why I want to tell Tina that this grassroots team is ready to meet this end-of-quarter goal.

**[Friend, rush a donation right now to help us close our fundraising gap before it's too late. Every single dollar helps us hold this Senate seat and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's do this,

Jordan Foster

The misleading attacks continue, and my campaign only has 10 more days to make sure the voters in the district know what I stand for. On Monday I will purchase the final week of media for the July 9th Runoff, which means I need any support you can give.

A generous donor has agreed to _**MATCH**_ any online contribution through the weekend. That means your contribution of $50 is worth $100 to my campaign. It’s a great opportunity for you to double your impact!

Joan Perry

body:

| | | **We 're facing our first public FEC fundraising deadline since Trump said OUT LOUD that he would happily accept intel from foreign sources if it would help him beat an opponent.**

[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dws-june-eoq?refcode=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190628_1_4&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=schultz&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190628_1_4&source=DWS_EM_FR_90DO_190628_1_4")

**And he 's hoping people will focus solely on the presidential campaigns and FORGET about the House.**

**Democrats across the country have to step up in a way that leaves NO DOUBT that the American people reject Trump.**

The numbers we post on Sunday at midnight go PUBLIC, and we still need to bring in $3,575.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Neglect of our borders
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate [Click here to unsubscribe
body:
There is a massive immigration crisis hitting our borders Peter, There is a massive immigration crisis hitting our borders that we cannot ignore. We must focus on securing our borders and ensuring the safety of our border communities and our entire homeland. Those on the far left have allowed our southern borders to be neglected and underfunded and that must end.

Border security shouldn't be a party vs. party issue; this is a national security issue. Now is our moment to tell Washington what we believe is truly important.

I'm working to make sure that our voices are heard and our opinions valued - [that is why I need your support.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6acd78f7c71c42ccb823a0ff1226b064&_e=kXhpPWWf-cEmvKXhjATW348KbLDrWa5wxUn-MIhKqabNNzRzH6GF_EqZgs5MRhW7PI_r7NBx_iF24p8X8u7kDkbmj0J49l-sHu4PSdfnxoVCacJtENCORxcf6dk2FZh0twZjITIs1hnTGc9_VzDrU0hIRYrFLEwzmv6HGvLIIC753HLP5J6yLRsXH2nAmpcwZx0Ua-2y_FqI1WA_lRScYCxDGMSMzmVnIRr398f714PtcGvedYGtnTUvnYJVE0sd6ENn-CfJfngQkrqounR5H6zxbmLVIuIrHPetyeh7KED9y3LW33e3vHH3HvKZfxeu5XP_Txz07nu395rptYAKsmZz380GDSlT_mcH8kaS1qMjVgJvu_4_-cPZOv4ixwRpw9yEMi-H2YpF0JJE64Xx1g%3D%3D) [ STAND WITH JOSH, DONATE NOW ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=6acd78f7c71c42ccb823a0ff1226b064&_e=kXhpPWWf-cEmvKXhjATW348KbLDrWa5wxUn-MIhKqabNNzRzH6GF_EqZgs5MRhW7PI_r7NBx_iF24p8X8u7kDkbmj0J49l-sHu4PSdfnxoVCacJtENCORxcf6dk2FZh0twZjITIs1hnTGc9_VzDrU0hIRYrFLEwzmv6HGvLIIC753HLP5J6yLRsXH2nAmpcwm2fL7rQ7prQrdUBTMS6piXkP4dC2mQsHuQsuYycWiXfYFjHQPEM72q2LjnyrGGkHyEE4FQKOJbFXmhj76i1U4VX-VZyiRKNtd9SWqfG8BPg50FWMlwwcvFxQhpLYAjXAOB-e0OKYvRA0Spw2cp8WxLcHT8yPk0ydGo4a7XqX-GOVBMXqSRVai9GRujOICjMzRmVO4muwqm06AVsv9sahcg%3D%3D) I am doing all I can to fight against those on the far left who are choosing to neglect this issue and pushing their one-sided agendas. Leave your mark by donating to Team Hawley and show that you stand with me. Every donation and name on the supporter list is one more step to showing Washington we are serious. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: One thing we didn't see at the presidential debates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a93/3386399525/VEsH/ "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Have you been watching the presidential debates? We have an exciting field. I'm pumped. I can't wait to see them continue to discuss ideas and how we can move our country forward after we defeat Donald Trump in 2020. I hope you saw one little thing that I also saw. Each of the Democratic candidates has one massive thing in common: **_none_ of them will be able to deliver on their proposals unless we take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the Republicans, and make it a functioning legislative body.** [**Donate $3 before June's end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We must take back the Senate.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a90/3386399525/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-06-28-debates&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Of course it's important to defeat Donald Trump. But it's just as important to retake the Senate, to give our next president a progressive majority who will help get America back on track. That's why I'm asking for your support. **Because I'm on the ballot in 2020, and Donald Trump is deciding whether to bring his campaign to Oregon, to try to expand the map and stop our progressive momentum in its tracks.** There are only a few days left before June's fundraising deadline. I don't take corporate PAC money or fossil fuel money -- I rely on you. [**Please chip in $3 today. Let's get this done.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a90/3386399525/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-06-28-debates&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Onward, _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a91/3386399525/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-06-28-debates&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a8e/3386399525/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-06-28-debates&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a8f/3386399525/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-06-28-debates&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2a18d/6cd27893/4d83bc44/15807a8c/3386399525/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-06-28-debates&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Cory Booker
subject: I want to hear from you on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, I woke up this morning still feeling the momentum from the debate on Wednesday night, and I'm so proud of what we're building together. I'm truly grateful for people like you who helped me get on that stage, but now that round one is over, it's time to look ahead to the next debates. [**So, I want to hear from you. Is there anything you didn 't hear in those first two debates that you think should be discussed?**](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ef/3689317847/VEsH/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-survey?source=em_20190628") It matters to me that I'm talking about the issues that matter to people like you -- because when I'm on that stage, you're who I'm representing. Can't wait to hear your thoughts, and I can't wait to get back out there in July. Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ef/3689317847/VEsE/ "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-survey?source=em_20190628")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ed/3689317847/VEsC/ "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ec/3689317847/VEsD/ "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1eb/3689317847/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ea/3689317847/VEsB/ "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc09ad/5fca0d19/91f6a5f/291bf1ee/3689317847/VEsO/ "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**[In a moment, I 'm going to ask you for $15 before my End of Quarter Deadline in 48 hours. But first, please let me explain why:](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afbc9/1588307337/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25")**_ My grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was 7 years old after losing both of her parents. She was an orphan when she came to this country. She took care of her younger sister by working as a maid and a housekeeper and never made it past the 4th grade. My mom was a single mother. She raised my brother Joaquin and me on the West Side of San Antonio. It's not the safest neighborhood, but to this day, I'm proud to call it home. I know it was a struggle every single month for her to find the money to pay the rent. But she taught me that even though we weren't born into privilege, we could be whatever we wanted to be. **When I took the stage at the Democratic debates this week, my message resonated with voters because I know your struggle.** ** ** I didn't come from privilege... I'm from one of those neighborhoods people avoid... I was raised by a single mother... I'm from an immigrant family... I'm so humbled that supporters across this country have rushed in money to keep my campaign going after my message resonated with them. I'm not taking a cent of corporate PAC money, so your support is fully fueling our campaign. You probably know that we need a huge amount of individual donors to qualify for the next debate -- and I haven't hit the threshold yet. If I made you proud in the debates -- and if you want my campaign in it for the long run -- please rush in $15. Help get me to the next debate stage and keep me in this race: | | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afbc8/1588307337/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

Thank you,

Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa34/1588307337/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa33/1588307337/VEsO/ "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa32/1588307337/VEsP/ "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/")

| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa31/1588307337/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa30/1588307337/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda4/3eb3e2fc/44da6fcc/744afa3f/1588307337/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage. Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

In case you missed it, the [Texas Tribune knows that this district is heating up](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7874803/75101835/1107650780?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA3NTRjNS1lNDk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tivzbJpBwa44P-yWPIsSzSKjG_2ZJwNbGyHqlJPsziE=), and we are primed to flip it in 2020. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump Pursues Smart China Strategy Heading Into Meeting With Xi Jinping
body:
"At President Trump’s planned meeting Saturday with Chinese President Xi Jinping at the G20 Summit in Japan, Trump is expected to..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=adce828705&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **President Trump Pursues Smart China Strategy Heading Into Meeting With Xi Jinping**

“At President Trump’s planned meeting Saturday with Chinese President Xi Jinping at the G20 Summit in Japan, Trump is expected to continue to advance a strategy that his administration introduced in his first six months in office: viewing China as a strategic competitor to the United States and its allies,” writes Dr. Nadia Schadlow, Senior Fellow at the Hudson Institute, in Fox News.

“This shift from an enabling posture to a competitive strategy was a response to years of Chinese Communist Party efforts to shape the international system in a way that disadvantaged the United States on trade and advanced China’s authoritarian system.”

President Trump has two goals for that approach, Schadlow says. The first is fixing economic relationships so that America is never giving a strategic advantage to an adversary. The second is tilting the global balance of power toward free, open societies.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4f8a34105c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Congress on Thursday approved $4.6 billion in emergency aid to deal with the border crisis, giving President Trump a symbolic victory on immigration and money to improve conditions for migrant children and families crowding the border,” Stephen Dinan and Gabriella Muñoz report in _[The Washington Times](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6187974459&e=3ee4985eea)_. President Trump “asked for the money nearly two months ago, but Democrats blocked it from being included in a disaster spending bill this month. Democrats also blocked 18 other Republican attempts to force the bill onto the floor.”
---
|
---
| “The Tax Cuts and Jobs Act was one of the most comprehensive tax overhauls ever enacted,” Bruce Thompson writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=125ce19449&e=3ee4985eea)_. “Yet as far as the media is concerned, the bill only slashed taxes for corporations and the wealthy . . . This characterization of the bill is false and misleading, yet it is an assertion endlessly reported by reporters and pundits in the national media, as well as Democrats.”
---
|
---
| “Americans hate to wait. We scout out the shortest grocery line. We choose the fastest delivery option. We chafe at slow-moving internet speeds. And we don’t like to wait for health care when we or our loved ones urgently need it,” Steven Law writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c96a06d3c2&e=3ee4985eea). “Why do government-run health care systems—including so-called single-payer schemes like Medicare-for-All—result in long waits for needed care? Because unlike the private sector, government has zero incentive to customize care to individual needs. It achieves efficiencies primarily by doling out one-size-fits-all health care to everyone, regardless of unique circumstances.”
---
|
---
| “On behalf of doctors across America and their patients, I am writing to underscore the importance of the executive order President Trump signed this week on ‘Improving Price and Quality Transparency in Healthcare.’ Everyone will benefit from this, save for those who profit from keeping Americans in the dark,” writes Marni Jameson Carey, Executive Director of the Association of Independent Doctors, in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5b99705862&e=3ee4985eea)_.
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7bc59e454&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1987cfcbd5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=3efcda6d03)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Zac Andrews
subject: Just two days left today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Hey there, we're up against a deadline**in just two days**. We must hit our grassroots goals every week and every month to do this - and Sri isn't taking corporate PAC money, so every dollar really matters.

Here's where we are:

**DEADLINE** | **JUNE 30**
---|---
**GOAL** | **$10,000**
**LEFT TO RAISE** | **$3,618**

**[Please, can you give $5, $10, $25, or more now to help us close the gap?](https://act.myngp.com/el/69aS3MJZTdQfqlKHZKhPpWTx2EcZqTJNSlOr5e3eTMQ=/Q2JsVpByzqt1EpCV5BhzMOLIPVWy4xYO64KQnLRx9Ug=?refcode=0628email)**

Friends, when Sri announced his run for Congress, he made clear that he was running a campaign fueled by everyday people like you and me. That means that we must work twice as hard to get the resources we need to win, because unlike Pete Olson, we can't rely on huge corporations to back our campaign.

Our District can't wait another two years - and we can't afford to stand idly by as special interests try to buy this race.

The momentum is on our side, but we cannot let up for even a second.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/69aS3MJZTdQfqlKHZKhPpWTx2EcZqTJNSlOr5e3eTMQ=/Q2JsVpByzqt1EpCV5BhzMOLIPVWy4xYO64KQnLRx9Ug=?refcode=0628email)

Thank you for your support in advance,

Zac Andrews, Finance Director

**STAY TUNED WITH OUR MOVEMENT!**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/69aS3MJZTdQfqlKHZKhPpWTx2EcZqTJNSlOr5e3eTMQ=/jzrJ51n7gREAUD4qj_5x1ABqTTOfaI1_cAm9370MClc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/69aS3MJZTdQfqlKHZKhPpWTx2EcZqTJNSlOr5e3eTMQ=/tQMumAnRu_fF4V3TNn2CaMPLX95kDkyhnIatyAeGeQ4=)

* * *

name: Gov. Bill Weld
subject: We’re Almost There!
body:
|
---
Friend -- We are in the final stretch of our [fundraising](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=1) reporting period! June 30th is the end of the quarter and media, pundits, and pollsters will judge the viability of this campaign by the numbers we report.[ I NEED YOUR HELP!!](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=2) We are only $53,575 away from hitting our goal! Your [contribution of $12, $26, $47, or $112](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=3) dollars will help us reach this. Please [consider giving today](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=4) and let's send President Trump a message that AMERICA DESERVES BETTER. The last two nights’ Democratic Debates made one thing clear: Millions of Americans who aren’t happy with Donald Trump as their President are not going to find the alternative they want in the Democratic field. [With your help](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=5), we ARE offering them a real choice. You deserve better. AMERICA deserves better. Help me [send a message to the White House](http://www.weld2020.org/donate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=6) and to the country. Contribute today! -Bill
[](https://www.weld2020.org/?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=7)
[](http://www.weld2020.org/?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=8)
Weld 2020 · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=9).
You can also keep up with Weld 2020 on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=10) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=donation_blast_debate&n=12), software for leaders.

name: Dan Baer
subject: I want to explain this personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
I know you're getting a lot of emails ahead of our big End of Quarter Deadline. I hope you'll give me a minute to explain.
|
---

| | I know you're getting a lot of emails ahead of our big End of Quarter Deadline.
**[I hope you'll give me a minute to explain why your $19 today is so critically important to our chances of flipping the Senate. >>](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb82662/232dfd1/9760977/62a102c9/2355220174/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/baer-email?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b1_baer_all&amount=19&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")** The billionaire Koch Brothers' Super PAC just jumped into this race. They know that if they lose Colorado, keeping the Senate in Mitch McConnell's grasp gets a whole lot tougher.

They're prepared to spend millions to crush our chances of finally flipping Colorado and the entire Senate.

But here's the truth: If 1,000 of us, then 10,000, then 100,000 _and more_ of us band together, we can build the grassroots coalition to take them on. And we will.

That's why we keep emailing and asking for you to chip in a few bucks or whatever you can. Your help makes more of a difference than you can even imagine!

So, that's why I am asking: Can you chip in and boost this movement before my very first End of Quarter Deadline? clean_body: I know you're getting a lot of emails ahead of our big End of Quarter Deadline. I hope you'll give me a minute to explain. | | | I know you're getting a lot of emails ahead of our big End of Quarter Deadline. "" The billionaire Koch Brothers' Super PAC just jumped into this race. They know that if they lose Colorado, keeping the Senate in Mitch McConnell's grasp gets a whole lot tougher. They're prepared to spend millions to crush our chances of finally flipping Colorado and the entire Senate. But here's the truth: If 1,000 of us, then 10,000, then 100,000 and more of us band together, we can build the grassroots coalition to take them on. And we will. That's why we keep emailing and asking for you to chip in a few bucks or whatever you can. Your help makes more of a difference than you can even imagine! So, that's why I am asking: Can you chip in and boost this movement before my very first End of Quarter Deadline? Our numbers are going public very soon, so your contribution now can make a huge difference. | | "" "" "" "" "" Thanks, Dan P.S. Those of you who have already donated -- thank you! name: Kamala 2020
subject: Momentum
body:
Kamala was on FIRE on the
debate stage last night -- she showed us that as president, she will lead
with dignity, honesty, and a commitment to fight on behalf of the people.

We need to capture that momentum right now. Pitch in
a donation before Sunday’s important
FEC deadline to show Kamala you’re in her corner:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1001&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $5 now
