[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1005&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1006&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Another Amount

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Original Message from Kamala Harris, June 28, 2019

I hope I made you proud during last night’s debate.

From combating the climate crisis to expanding health care to curbing gun
violence, each of the candidates on that stage brought real, bold ideas to
the table on how to achieve a better America.

Let me
be clear: I’m the only candidate on that debate stage who has the proven
ability to prosecute the case against four more years of this
Administration.

If you’re with me in this fight, I need you to make
an investment in our campaign today.
Our next FEC deadline is on Sunday at midnight, and we are up against our
steepest goal ever: raising $1 million online before the deadline.

The task we have ahead of us won’t be easy, but I’m not running to be your
next president because it’s easy. I’m running because I firmly believe in
our vision for the future of this country -- and I’m willing to fight for
it.

If you believe in what we can accomplish together, I need you to pitch in
right now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1007&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1008&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1009&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1010&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1011&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1012&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Another Amount

What we are trying to accomplish is not insurmountable. Many of us have
been through some difficult times -- moments where progress seemed
impossible. We were fearless then, and we must be fearless now.

I know that if enough people step up and pitch in, we can keep up the
momentum we have seen so far during our campaign, continue building our
movement, and deliver the change millions of Americans are ready and
waiting for.

I’m fired up. If you’re with me, let’s show them all the energy and power
of our grassroots team. Pitch in anything you can to help us reach our
goal before Sunday’s FEC deadline:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1013&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $5 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=1014&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $25 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=1015&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $50 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=1016&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $100 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=1017&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Chip in $250 now

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-18-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1018&refcode2=5463_5755789_WrtY3-&akid=5463%2E5755789%2EWrtY3- ]Another Amount

We’re at a turning point, both in this race and in the history of our
country. I’m confident we have what it takes to win.

Thank you for believing in the future of this country. I’m proud to stand
with you in this fight.

For The People,

— Kamala Harris

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Election WATCH (via Lipinski)
subject: ↘↘ this is huge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
| | | | | We know you are aware of how important this is, Peter. It’s our first FEC report going head-to-head with our opponents, and these will be the numbers that Republicans, the media, and election watchers will use to measure our strength.

Our opponents are waiting in the wings to see us fail — **we can’t let them see a weak fundraising report.**

[**Contribute now to ensure we have the momentum to win this race →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/7875993/75114476/-572411686?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTM1NDVkOS1lZTk5LWU5MTEtYWJjNC0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5FIFXdXHYu8OkevUeu9rncvwGsxIFLaSPZt5ZKofJng=&refcode=DL_EM_FR_90DO_190628_2_2&amount=10&recurring=true)

**Begin forwarded message:**

Peter, we’re facing a huge deadline on Sunday.

**And it’s not just any ordinary deadline — it’s our first Federal Election Commission (FEC) reporting deadline going head-to-head with my opponents.**

All eyes will be on the numbers I report to see if our campaign can go the distance. That makes this the most important deadline we’ve faced so far this year.

[**That’s why we need to raise $15,000 before midnight on Sunday. name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I'm still brimming with energy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Anyone can talk. But what matters is action. What matters are results. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377176c/691c9bd/6d531abc/11a41cf8/1342762669/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend, I'm still brimming with energy from last night--from seeing the names of Debate Donors who helped supercharge our campaign this week, to the adrenaline of taking the stage and sharing my vision of an America where we get progressive things done, together.

Look--we heard a lot of great ideas on stage last night.

But the truth is, I was the only one on that debate stage who has actually done what everyone else is just talking about. If that track record inspires you, help us take this campaign to the next level. **** **[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebatebump-all_all_contribbutton2&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** **I used the scrappy spirit I developed as a small business owner to actually make Colorado one of the most progressive states in America.**

We got real results. We actually passed universal background checks, got to near universal health care, and attacked climate change with the toughest methane regulations in the country.

We worked together--Democrats and Republicans, businesses and non-profits alike--to make a real difference in people's lives. We dramatically expanded reproductive rights and reduced teenage abortions by two-thirds. We were the first to legalize marijuana, and in the process, transformed our justice system. And we created the number one economy in America.

We did it all without radically expanding our government or touting socialism as the solution.

**Anyone can talk. But what matters is action. What matters are results.**

Today, our team woke up to face our next big challenge: our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.

The amount we raise by Sunday night's FEC filing deadline will decide how quickly we can grow this campaign--and show how many people share our goal of getting real results that change lives, and can change the course of our nation.

**If you like what you saw on the debate stage last night, chip in now:** ****[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebate-all_all_b1&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebatebump-all_all_b50&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&amount=50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")****** ******[](https://secure.hickenlooper. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_fr_20190628_JH_20190628-fr-JH-lastnightdebatebump-all_all_bother&recurring=auto&amounts=1,5,25,50,100,500&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")******
Thank you,
John

body:

---

Hello,

We're three days out from a crucial FEC reporting deadline, and that means my campaign (and a bunch of other Democratic campaigns) is going to be emailing you a lot over the weekend to reach our fundraising goal.

My campaign is scheduled to send EIGHT emails over the next three days! But here's why:

**Raising money through emails like this means I can do less "Call Time" phoning up supporters for donations, and instead, I can be actively engaged in fighting back against Trump's dangerous agenda.**

So, here's how you can keep your inbox count down and avoid all the incoming emails: [_**pitch in $10 toward our $25,000 FEC deadline goal today, and we 'll keep your address out of the next seven emails.**_](http://ma.edmarkey. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-june2019-eoq?refcode=EM-062819_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I wish as much as anybody that fundraising wasn't such a significant part of my job as a Senator. But the reality is, fighting back on the ground against President Trump and his administration requires a lot of resources.

And FEC deadlines are so important because our fundraising numbers will be public on the FEC's website after the deadline. National Republicans will be looking at it for any vulnerabilities in my campaign that they can exploit to defeat me. We can't give them any signs.

_**[So, if you pitch in $10 or more today toward our $25,000 FEC deadline goal, and we'll make sure we keep your address out of the next seven emails over the weekend.](http://ma.edmarkey. Ed

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Deadline approaching.....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
We live in the greatest country that has ever graced the earth. We need leaders in Congress who act like it. My years in the military taught me.......
Friend,

We live in the greatest country that has ever graced the earth. **We need leaders in Congress who act like it.**

My years in the military taught me that when you believe in something...** _YOU DEFEND IT_. **I believe in the values that make us great: **_Duty_. _Honor_. _Country_.**

[**I’m running for the honor of representing my friends, family and neighbors in “The People’s House” and with your help, I’ll win.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_e=FkZvsUy89iGGeE4YQ6Q78VGNMSEyPRbWqMHHos8gzxmJmGA27qmrGQ2vM5VAdb04ztvNKDIHv0Qg9eHJ1wTYld314Y_RUL3SlW1Vb1ORGdCdwqIly5bcFgo1nPNoLZjkP-xssYOj3-Ziouop1kbIpMKddPcqT2a6DSjjHtEFe595JYTmfFNeCdjoEJjmrqoJA3ICpaM9dBRY2nF-dFrZ9-p3Q4MfMDL_QFq7SN_y-MjnLwNHgD3ju87WK8LVjnmN1amYJLkF0MFineA-s-ZouzCUqG4NReK8uR7kBHaTDIV-n2xu4rqn-XmxtQMlVp-5bbvd0grkijjFXEsM8K_-io3Sx_ffRM7pOxlnJjAlj1qnhJIqpSKMrXqy-5Rs9YzdNZ6y7RIxjssYWbw3eVK1KSUaGhrPKgFcALOlnvmGmbwcnmEs_K25du36lT4Y4LYm)

I’m a native Houstonian, born and raised. My father served in the Army. With that kind of role model, it’s not a surprise along with my brother and sister, I am a graduate of West Point.

While flying combat missions in an Apache helicopter over Iraq, I didn’t know whether I would ever return home. But like the millions of veterans who came before me, I believed, as I still do today, that America is worth fighting for.

Right now, we have the fewest veterans in Congress since World War II. Instead of securing our border, strengthening our economy, putting our fiscal house in order and working with President Trump, the career politicians play partisan games, scream and bicker and serve themselves.

I learned in the Army that your word is your bond. That’s a stark contrast to the all talk no action politicians in DC.

Our opponent is Liberal Democrat Lizzie Fletcher. She eked out a victory in 2018 by promising to be independent. **She pledged to stand up to Nancy Pelosi. But her first vote in Congress was to elect Nancy Pelosi Speaker of the House.** And she’s voted in lockstep with Nancy Pelosi ever since, jettisoning our Houston values in favor of Pelosi’s San Francisco values. Fletcher has voted with Pelosi 100% of the time.

[**I’m going to defeat Lizzie Fletcher, but I need your help.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_e=FkZvsUy89iGGeE4YQ6Q78VGNMSEyPRbWqMHHos8gzxmJmGA27qmrGQ2vM5VAdb04ztvNKDIHv0Qg9eHJ1wTYld314Y_RUL3SlW1Vb1ORGdCdwqIly5bcFgo1nPNoLZjkP-xssYOj3-Ziouop1kbIpMKddPcqT2a6DSjjHtEFe595JYTmfFNeCdjoEJjmrqoJwm-g4Ds_3OuHRyzJ539u-Oxp1-Olh-GQM3EIIq1nPB5MLkRjyRJdWBXcGrk9VhimzqzH6C84E6GZ1YDpL5kszd48Qkin7aWxmD3l_Bm1XA_f4dIcsMVuFWRmTr-Q9cce-jXwZn9QiqDuluBYoLxtC15wd4qqrPaIqK46ZXm7G42rRat_1qKGz3EtVfh7XAnJMAPcB1K4F5fb9eov8s9ExOD6Qxn_EwET5qz5bDMav1bxHK3Jqoaf304nqPLb-xCo)

In just 72 hours, we face our first critical fundraising deadline. Everyone will be watching—but especially our opponents.
****[END OF QUARTER CONTRIBUTION](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_e=FkZvsUy89iGGeE4YQ6Q78VGNMSEyPRbWqMHHos8gzxmJmGA27qmrGQ2vM5VAdb04ztvNKDIHv0Qg9eHJ1wTYld314Y_RUL3SlW1Vb1ORGdCdwqIly5bcFgo1nPNoLZjkP-xssYOj3-Ziouop1kbIpMKddPcqT2a6DSjjHtEFe595JYTmfFNeCdjoEJjmrqoJM1opfE-qSTyFMDpliR8E2sftsoa5CEeSdkFxY5AmQ1VTD9dpxJ5D37sq5G-bS22j4euGeFDkG7fFgvfSYvf98uBx-EfSI7UGceuyY0DP_NnX0E9Sm5TJP1wsku-OjCH9nWAd_5HpOuFBAq2O-S6Ug3gKP_VphmE_7jp6ECqiB49rf84kTR6N9g5PGzVcbgh7V72Ph6CJFAsb2NcUGAK8PBWINVvZZGFZwqoGYY2RYTVI_Bu-ZdFL6gYfjEgVJ1ht)****
---
I need your help to raise another $20,000 by midnight on June 30th. [**Your grassroots contribution of $250, $100, $75, $50 or $25 will get us there.**](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_e=FkZvsUy89iGGeE4YQ6Q78VGNMSEyPRbWqMHHos8gzxmJmGA27qmrGQ2vM5VAdb04ztvNKDIHv0Qg9eHJ1wTYld314Y_RUL3SlW1Vb1ORGdCdwqIly5bcFgo1nPNoLZjkP-xssYOj3-Ziouop1kbIpMKddPcqT2a6DSjjHtEFe595JYTmfFNeCdjoEJjmrqoJF4LvZRRbzT5GPXPIpCcyu-93y42DOsf5fYAHXuFEXAdBDxUDTOufBsN0Pm4KLBz7y0aFwBdx82PcveTEt7WVRjgR_y-bnX_QKR4eqg9yAdpBv4nidmT9f6dq4SKrmEVlpFJKoFPWzWRkhHupIdx2hFUFNo4zpLJW7xoNkc6GGiaLpJQDZZJuIAietfX-Hb5n_Fjb-e-kZ7Z03d8jWkh7r2QU0IGBTXVoAPaqGvtbSnRcWxo2v1QyRpJSlS6zeFyg)

That’s our mission. Will you help me accomplish it?

God Bless Texas and America,

Wesley Hunt

P.S. **_DUTY_. _HONOR_. _COUNTRY_. **Those three words guided me in battle and they will be my north star as your Republican Representative in Congress. [**Standing together, and fighting shoulder-to-shoulder, I know we’ll win. **](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_e=FkZvsUy89iGGeE4YQ6Q78VGNMSEyPRbWqMHHos8gzxmJmGA27qmrGQ2vM5VAdb04ztvNKDIHv0Qg9eHJ1wTYld314Y_RUL3SlW1Vb1ORGdCdwqIly5bcFgo1nPNoLZjkP-xssYOj3-Ziouop1kbIpMKddPcqT2a6DSjjHtEFe595JYTmfFNeCdjoEJjmrqoJ4nzgeHJdimF2VMvYAu5BVaAqy7H1Lo6T9f54lp5HOAYnAQH2iTg2vLCJa5oLkIRNeCCtXOZpbGYrpyM1pLYXnmyeZFVTyHxau0mlIKDTgGxs734Hlf97Fry7BnSBdclazEyn3ZSKqa7L3vFZea2-RoAVlcs176RkBkN3ZZNf8HhfIh1YgeF_ZywQHbaZSMflVvQZM6_gqGd0lvDK27DkjenR1xzD6n8UlhP3Do_718HcFVcu_8bhckm1fghPxVlq)

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=27c1ece446284f559c0b92f1a0be66e3&_t=m4JE2c3I_cRcPj0rVNVKFwVZ9zpgH-CBwfZpJ4fSvZkntSObBcoRBT0gu3rUvnP9D0yiiE-_MYMl4TDKE6jIpJeJRN32nqIUYFkB9QHWcQxymh0h_laBJQFoMUAsE3nOU3fm9LhkhwnHjCfAJq3L5Ba6oGxXQL-olfzVYPbdWBI%3D).

| | Wow -- Julian's results from the post-debate focus groups are INCREDIBLE. After the debate: \--NBC News reported 5 out of 6 of the young respondents thought Julian won \--Nate Silver reported voters were 7 times (!!!) more likely to vote for Julian \--And Julian's favorability increased by nearly 20 points -- more than anyone in the entire Democratic field!!! We just spoke to Julian, and we know he's so humbled that his message resonated with America. **These 48 hours before our End of Quarter Deadline are critically important for him.** Julian needs a massive showing of support to show the strength of this movement and prove we're in it for the long haul. name: Team Beto
subject: We’re a bit worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
With two dozen Democrats running for president, it’s important to stand out. One area where we’ve always risen to the top of the pack is our grassroots fundraising. Without taking a dime from PACs or lobbyists, we’ve shown we can compete head-to-head with the best-funded campaigns.
#
With two dozen Democrats running for president, it’s important to stand out. One area where we’ve always risen to the top of the pack is our grassroots fundraising. Without taking a dime from PACs or lobbyists, we’ve shown we can compete head-to-head with the best-funded campaigns.
But lately we’re a bit worried. Donald Trump raised $25 million in a single day! And some of the Democrats in this race are raising millions at big fundraising events. **In order to compete, we have to hit our $600,000 goal by our end-of-quarter deadline on Sunday.**
[Can you help us close the gap with a $3 contribution today? Your donations help ensure we’re on track to run a strong nationwide campaign that can compete with the entire field.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17995?refcode=ema20190628-39315&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=39315%2E444211%2E909J79)
Emails like this one pay for half our campaign expenses, but most people open them and don’t give. We totally understand that not everyone can give each time. But if you’d be one of the ones to chip in this time, it would mean the world to us.
Thank you for all your help,
Team Beto

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=39315%2E444211%2E909J79). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

Without taking a dime from PACs or lobbyists, we’ve shown we can compete head-to-head with the best-funded campaigns. But lately we’re a bit worried. Donald Trump raised $25 million in a single day! And some of the Democrats in this race are raising millions at big fundraising events. In order to compete, we have to hit our $600,000 goal by our end-of-quarter deadline on Sunday. Emails like this one pay for half our campaign expenses, but most people open them and don’t give. We totally understand that not everyone can give each time. But if you’d be one of the ones to chip in this time, it would mean the world to us. Thank you for all your help, Team Beto Paid for by Beto for America

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:

Peter, I know you're getting bombarded with emails from us, so I'll make two quick points:
* **The American people know Joe Biden.** They know his heart. They know he can beat Donald Trump. And they know he'll be ready to do the job as president on Day One.

* **This first public deadline is critical,** and our grassroots supporters will make or break it.

I know I can count on you, all of you, to help us show the world that we know Joe Biden and we need him to be our next president.

We just need $115,000 more to hit our goal. **Peter -- can you make your first donation so we don 't fall short?** | | [**DONATE $5**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/293194f4/1cd0ac28/1708b4f9/356c2875/2022369784/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_june2019?refcode=email-bsd-20190628postdebate-b1_FDR_rem_NA-F1_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=20190628postdebate&utm_content=b1_FDR_rem_NA&utm_term=F1_S1_C1&amount=5")

name: Bruce
subject: Elizabeth's fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
No one is tougher than Elizabeth. When she comes home from the presidential campaign trail, her eyes only tell one story: She is energized because of all the... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852e34d/45c30650/17eeeb352/669aaf34/766121052/VEsH/ "https://elizabethwarren.com/")
---
When I walked Elizabeth from the green room to the stage for the first Democratic presidential primary debate on Wednesday, I knew she was ready to show why she's in this fight. If you watched that debate, you know she delivered.

Now it's up to the rest of us. This coming Sunday is the next FEC fundraising deadline, after which we will announce how much we have raised -- and how many people have donated to own an equal piece of this campaign.

Your contribution will help continue the fight to level the playing field for working people.

And this fight has been Elizabeth's life work.

Years ago, Elizabeth was busy flying back and forth from Washington, where she was working on oversight for the Wall Street bailout and fighting for the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

When she would come home, at dinner I could see in her eyes whether it had been another frustrating few days.

It was a tough fight against the big banks and their armies of lobbyists.

But no one is tougher than Elizabeth. And before long, she had helped set up the CFPB and was ready to come home to Massachusetts, where she would go on to keep up the fight by running for Senate.

These days, when she comes home from the presidential campaign trail, her eyes only tell one story: She is energized because of all the people she has met across the country who are ready for big, structural change.

**Elizabeth always makes me proud. I would love to be able to do my small part before Sunday 's fundraising deadline, and I would be very grateful to have your support today.

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: I'm setting a goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
This weekend, we're facing the most important moment of this campaign so far, and we need to show the strength of this movement ahead of the FEC's fundraising deadline on Sunday night.
That's why I'm setting a goal: we need 250 supporters like you to step up before the deadline.
**[Will you contribute $5 right now to help us get there, team?](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190628&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I have lived my life with a sense of service and sacrifice, from my time in the armed forces to working as a teacher to now, serving as Mayor of Helena. When I get to the U.S. Senate, I'll fight for our deeply-held values and families in Montana and across the nation every single day.
I'll fight to defend affordable health care, preserve our public lands, support our teachers and unions, and address the threat of climate change. But first, I need you to stand with me now.
[**We need 250 supporters to chip in before the deadline. Contribute $5 now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190628&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wilmotcollins. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190628&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Groundswell
body:
Two weeks from tomorrow, Governor Eric Holcomb will bring together Hoosiers for a big event and a major announcement. And in case you’ve missed it...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/groundswell?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://holcombforindiana.com/events-713/?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

Groundswell

Two weeks from tomorrow, Governor Eric Holcomb will bring together Hoosiers for a big event and a major announcement. And in case you’ve missed it, I’d like to invite you to be a part of it.

He’s making his major announcement on Saturday, July 13 at 1 p.m. ET in the iconic Hoosier Gym in Knightstown. You might recognize the Hoosier Gym as the home court of the Hickory Huskers in the movie “Hoosiers,” or you might remember it as one of the sites where Governor Holcomb has shot baskets in all 92 counties.

RSVP here (https://holcombforindiana.com/events-713/?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to let us know if you can make it, and share the information here on Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/events/889411451404210/?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) to invite your friends and family.

What I think is most amazing about this upcoming announcement is the surge of support we’re seeing for Governor Holcomb’s policies and Indiana’s incredible momentum from ALL Hoosiers. Come to this event, and you’re see families, young people, people new to politics, people from all corners of the state...and people you might not expect to see at an event like this. It really is a groundswell. It’s incredible.

Join us on July 13, hear Governor Holcomb’s major announcement, and be part of the Hoosier groundswell.

-Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Governor Holcomb:
More Great Jobs, Safer Workplaces,
& Helping Hoosiers with Disabilities

This was another week of new Indiana jobs and great bills ceremonially signed for Hoosiers!
* Today, Governor Holcomb is in Bloomington with life sciences company Catalent Pharma. They’re breaking ground on a new drug product manufacturing facility, which comes after the announcement in January that the company is investing $100 million in Indiana and creating more than 200 new Hoosier jobs. Did you know that Indiana is the nation’s second larger exporter of life science products? Read more about Catalent’s Indiana job plans here (http://www.insideindianabusiness.com/story/39744101/catalent-to-create-200-new-jobs-in-bloomington?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* On Monday, Governor Holcomb ceremonially signed a new law that puts the safety of Hoosiers on the job first. It increases the penalties if employers disregard worker safety and their actions lead to the death of a Hoosier. He was joined by two parents who worked to honor their daughter through this important legislation. You can read more about this new law here (https://wpta21.com/news/digging-deeper/workerscomp/2019/06/24/digging-deeper-family-joins-holcomb-to-commemorate-passage-of-workplace-safety-reform/?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .
* On Monday, Governor Holcomb also ceremonially signed a new law that helps adults and children with disabilities. This includes streamlining the application process for First Steps, Indiana’s early intervention program for children with developmental delays. Read more about Governor Holcomb’s work helping Hoosiers with disabilities here (https://www.newsandtribune.com/news/bills-to-help-hoosiers-with-disabilities-signed-into-law/article_29163b1a-96bc-11e9-b093-43107e163a41.html?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

Thank you, Governor Holcomb, for your laser-focus on helping Hoosiers!

Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Makes $1 Million Transfer to Governor Holcomb

It’s the last week of the first fundraising period of 2019, and Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch just made history!

This week, she transferred $1 million from her campaign account into the Eric Holcomb for Indiana campaign account, which is the most transferred by any lieutenant governor in Indiana history!

Lt. Governor Crouch made the announcement at an event where Team Holcomb – the joint fundraising committee of the Indiana Republican Party and Eric Holcomb for Indiana – raising an ADDITIONAL $1 million. This comes on the heels of a combined $5.745 million cash on hand at the end of 2018 (between the Indiana Republican Party, Governor Holcomb’s campaign account and Lt. Governor Crouch’s campaign account).

Stay tuned to learn about 2019 fundraising to-date for Governor Holcomb leading up to the big announcement on July 13!
http://lugarseries.com/?mc_cid=9a1b8d97c2&mc_eid=f59b25f4e9&mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]

National Federation of Republican Women Convention Coming to Indiana!

Save the date! The National Federation of Republican Women will be hosting their convention in Indianapolis this year on September 26-29. You’re invited to join them for their opening party – hosted by our own Indiana Federation of Republican Women – the evening of September 27 at the JW Marriott in downtown Indianapolis.

Learn more about the convention here (http://indiana.gop/events/nfrw-convention?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and register to attend the national convention here (http://www.nfrw.org/convention-indianapolis?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

Get President Trump on the Ballot!

This week, President Donald Trump officially announced that Vice President Mike Pence will continue to be his running mate in 2020 (great news!)!

Hoosiers are fired-up to re-elect President Trump and Vice President Pence, but first, we’ve got to get him on the ballot in Indiana – and that requires ballot petition signatures in each of Indiana’s congressional districts.

Would you commit to help collect petition signatures among your family, friends and neighbors? It’s a very easy way to stand with President Donald Trump right now, and help him continue to make America great! Just fill out this form (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf2JItBHI6v3IIKv9yky6sxbXMkPhrgArt0fgP8QrDOUW1Gfw/viewform?vc=0&c=0&w=1&fbclid=IwAR18KM_ZWmaNtWoQT1Evs6YIr2qEKSRF73swoC9dwa7-jUEQ5RoZpn_RLgU&mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and we’ll be in touch soon to get you started!

Upcoming Republican Events

July 10 (http://indiana.gop/events/republican-day-jay-county-fair-0?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Republican Day at the Jay County Fair
July 30 (http://indiana.gop/events/take-me-out-ballgame?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Take Me Out to the Ballgame with Downtown GOP Club, GIRWC, Broad Ripple GOP Club
August 14 (http://indiana.gop/events/fulton-county-republican-party-golf-outing?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Fulton County Republican Party Golf Outing
August 23 (http://indiana.gop/events/2019-hendricks-county-golf-outing?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : Hendricks County Republican Party Golf Outing
September 26 (http://indiana.gop/events/nfrw-convention?mc_cid=7245291eab&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) : National Federation of Republican Women Convention

**Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? Let us know at info@indiana.go (mailto:info@indiana.go) p (mailto:info@indiana.go) ! **

subject: BIG POLLING NEWS FROM THE DEBATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:

**We just learned that Tim had the highest bump of any Democratic presidential candidate according to _FiveThirtyEight _and _Morning Consult_. Our numbers went up 1,100%! ** Wednesday night proved that Tim has the vision and pragmatism to lead the Democrats to victory -- but now we have to focus on the Federal Election Commission (FEC) deadline this Sunday. **We have less than 48 hours left to prove our grassroots momentum**.

[_**Team, can we count on you to help Tim show strong numbers before his first FEC deadline?**_](http://secure.timryanforamerica. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/tr-fec-deadline?amount=3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=automatic&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190628_3_7_T1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMETeam+can+we+count+on+you+to+hel&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190628_3_7_T2&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190628_3_7_T2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._

Morley

| | Did you read Will's email, friend? **[Donate now to help Francis before the first public reporting deadline of our campaign. We still need to raise $6,129 by Sunday at midnight to reach our goal.](https://conole.bsd. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-june19?amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Donate+now+to+help+Francis+before+the+fi&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190628_2_6&source=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190628_2_6&refcode=FC_EM_FR_90DO_190628_2_6")

Begin forwarded message:**

Sunday is our first-ever Federal Election Commission deadline of the campaign. But what does that mean?

This means at midnight on June 30th, we've got to close our books and show how much money we have in the bank.

[**We still need $8,304 in the door by midnight Sunday to build a campaign capable of winning in November and fighting to restore a democracy that represents voters, not special interests. Republicans and the media are watching closely.**](https://conole.bsd. subject: I just left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I just left Miami after the debates. [_**I spent every second on the debate stage fighting for you. Now, I 'm asking you to fight for me. Your $15 has never been more important than it is in this critical moment. Can I count on you? >>**_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda7/3eb3e2fc/448b3915/744ac4ff/291486527/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=25") Not only did we stand up for our winning vision on that stage... We proved that even someone who comes from an immigrant family like I do... Who was raised by a single mother like I was... Who struggled to overcome adversity like I did... Can become President, too. **I need a massive showing of support before my End of Quarter Deadline this weekend to show the strength of this movement and prove that we 're in this for the long haul.** I left it all out on that debate stage. If I made you proud, your $15 would mean so much to me in this moment. | | [**Chip in $15 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda7/3eb3e2fc/448b3915/744ac4fe/291486527/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b3_castro_all_rs&recur_weekly=on&recurring=on&amount=15")

---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the first debates and send him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must reach 130,000 donors this summer to secure his spot on the Democratic debate stage.

Julian hasn't qualified yet, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money. Will you help him get there?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda7/3eb3e2fc/448b3915/744ac4e7/291486527/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda7/3eb3e2fc/448b3915/744ac4e6/291486527/VEsHBA/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcda7/3eb3e2fc/448b3915/744ac4e5/291486527/VEsHBw/ "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[**Will you donate $5 before Sunday 's deadline? **](https://act.myngp.com/el/lFqyvyNjm9Hp--gNVMvsyA5oZWBiUqLFl34xn7hP4ZI=/MkzlIvXcIPuLkY2vh0O5jyazfWqO6ffcFPUrXxiZp0I=?refcode=X_062819_EOQ_F&amount=5&recurring=auto)

I know my campaign has been reaching out a lot lately -- but there's a reason.

We count on grassroots contributions to fund this campaign.

But -- because it's a lot harder to fund a campaign $25 or so at a time -- there are periods during my campaigns where I need to ask a whole lot of you to contribute.

subject: URGENT: Our fundraising has slowed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Keeping this brief.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4fa61/c1f7015/626a5567/114769a4/1083107328/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWVtYWlsLWp1bmUiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6InJ0d18yMDE5MDYyOF9lbS0yLWZ1bGwifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-2-full&recurring=auto") Friend, this is critical: **Our fundraising has slowed, and we 're in serious danger of missing our critical end-of-month fundraising deadline. [Will you chip in right now to help us close the gap?](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june?refcode=rtw_20190628_em-2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Republicans will do whatever it takes to win this race and keep the Senate as a rubber stamp for Trump.

We will face money from Senate Republicans, super PACs, and dark money interests every step of the way -- and if this grassroots team doesn't respond, there is no way we can keep up and keep fighting for our Minnesota values.

That's why we're coming to you now. Our biggest FEC deadline of the campaign is just _two days away,_ and we're still short of our goal by $16,774.

**[Can you pitch in before midnight and help make sure we have the resources to stop the GOP from turning this Senate seat red in 2020? Make a contribution of $10 here.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Beshear for Kentucky
subject: TOSS-UP in the governor's race!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
As Election Day draws closer, this campaign just keeps building momentum! The Cook Political Report says the race is a toss-up, so everyone from our field organizers to Andy's former primary opponents
|
---
[ ](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b6d/ad6dc73/1501fa2b/db414dd/4121021535/VEsH/ "https://andybeshear.com/")

| | | [](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b6d/ad6dc73/1501fa2b/db414d3/4121021535/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june2019eoqnd?refcode=20190628nd__146__&amount=5")
---
Peter,

As Election Day draws closer, this campaign just keeps building momentum! **The _Cook Political Report_ says the race is a toss-up**, so everyone from our field staff to Andy's former primary opponents have been working their tails off on the trail -- and it's paying off.

But there are still just a little more than four months to go, and we are up against two major challenges:
1. **Bevin 's deep-pocketed allies are already spending a _ton_ of money to blunt our momentum.** They went up with vicious attack ads the day after the primary election, and they're surely planning even more.
2. We just got word today that Matt Bevin personally loaned his campaign $2 million, and there's plenty more where that came from.

Matt Bevin is clearly running scared. And he's relying on his big money, special-interest backers, and his own personal fortune to bail him out.

We don't need to match Bevin's self-funding dollar for dollar, but running a winning campaign is going to take _a lot_ of resources. Andy isn't a multimillionaire with billionaire buddies -- that's why we need **every member of this grassroots team** to pitch in what they can if Andy's going to win!

**So with our all-important end-of-month deadline coming up in just two days, we 've set a goal of bringing 200 new donors on board before the deadline. Will you make your first donation today to help us meet it?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $50>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b6d/ad6dc73/1501fa2b/db414eb/4121021535/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june2019eoqnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190628nd__146__&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557b6d/ad6dc73/1501fa2b/db414e9/4121021535/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhhVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NiJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-june2019eoqnd?express_lane=true&refcode=20190628nd__146__&amount=100")**

Thanks for your support,
Team Beshear

name: Jessica Boad
subject: WOW! (this will be record breaking)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team - WOW! Since Michael emailed this morning, donations have been pouring in from Democrats across the country.

[We're on track to have our biggest grassroots fundraising day since Michael launched his campaign. Will you help us break our record by pitching in before midnight?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Here's Michael's email from this morning:
* * *
> Here's the truth: [I'm asking you to make a contribution to my campaign, I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
>
> Many people considered our campaign a long shot. They said I had almost no chance of being in the debate.
>
> [Last night, we proved them wrong - all thanks to you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
>
> Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I've taken in this journey has been because you're there with me, ensuring our campaign has had what it takes to win this hard-fought race.
>
> [It's your commitment to fueling our campaign that keeps us going. ](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
>
> Despite coming into this race later than many of the other candidates, our grassroots campaign has made incredible progress.
>
> Sunday is our first public fundraising deadline, and the doubters are itching to "prove" that this campaign won't make it. We need to show that we're here to stay.
>
> [**Today I 'm counting on your support again, because we can't fall short after coming so far. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters ahead of this crucial fundraising deadline? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
>
---
| [RUSH A DONATION >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Last night, on stage, I shared my vision for building opportunity for every American and restoring integrity to our government. Now I'm planning for what comes next.

As a senator from a purple state, I've never known an easy election, and I'm ready to continue this fight no matter how many people doubt us.

[But I need to know you're standing with me.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team, your support is crucial ahead of this deadline. Will you rush a donation right now to shut down the doubters again? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbadc2/134673f2/163e073/6996a7aa/4070385721/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/clean-up-corruption?refcode=EM_FR_B3_062819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: unprecedented problem
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | I asked. Speaker Pelosi asked. Adam Schiff asked. Khizr Khan asked. Deb Haaland asked. Ted Lieu asked. Gabby Giffords asked. Paul Begala asked. James Carville asked. Now I'm asking again. **That 's how absolutely critical my first end-of-quarter deadline is to winning my race and flipping the Senate. ** Since I announced, I've watched President Trump and Mitch McConnell make unprecedented moves to steal this seat. Now, more than ever, I need to know my strongest supporters are behind me and will defend our movement. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b52d/18e32a7f/59febd16/7bac2daf/1889834363/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190628_em_fr_b4_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25")

name: Kamala Harris
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I’ll be direct: I am reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for president. **[You can do so right here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&t=1&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)** I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why your contribution matters so much in this moment. **We have real momentum right now.** Millions of people heard our message for the very first time last night and are paying attention to what we do next. As we close in on our most important fundraising deadline to date, I’m counting on your help to show everyone -- from the political pundits to our primary opponents -- how strong our grassroots movement is. After Sunday’s deadline, the amount of money we have raised and the number of people who have contributed will be made public -- including those critical post-debate numbers. I want to make sure our campaign looks as strong as possible on that report. **That’s why I’m asking: Will you pitch in right now? Anything you can give before the FEC deadline will make a difference in this moment:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=3&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)
---
| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190628-eoq?refcode=ema190628-20-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=6&refcode2=5469_5755789_JfVkID&akid=5469%2E5755789%2EJfVkID)

**This election isn’t about me -- it’s about you.** It’s about your hopes, your dreams, and your fears. That’s why this campaign has been, and always will be, powered by the people.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris
